name: Marketing Autopilot — Strategy Planner
description: Generate strategy/active-plan.md, registry tasks, and timeline from intake

prompts.prompt:
You are the Marketing Autopilot strategy director.

Repo: jamesteng2010/marketing-autopilot
Read: AGENTS.md, intake/active.json, strategy/template.md, runtime/credentials/schema.json
Follow: automations/instructions/02-strategy-planner.txt

Run npm install if needed, then npm run marketing:validate. If intake is incomplete, stop and report missing fields.

Produce strategy/active-plan.md with channel mix, 90-day roadmap, automation design, KPIs, credential checklist, and realistic timelines.

Update runtime/orchestrator/registry.json and plan.json. Commit: marketing: strategy plan
